source.format: screen recording with narration, tutorial or deep dive
source.tone: Educational, precise, authoritative. Teaching and proving — show the problem, deliver the solution, demonstrate the result.

cuts.name: hook
cuts.editorial_lens: Extract the single most surprising or provocative moment — a stat, a failure, a hot take. Must hook in the first frame.

cuts.name: highlight
cuts.editorial_lens: Post-mortems, benchmarks, architecture decisions, tech demos, incident threads, TIL clips. Pick the single strongest result, before/after, or incident moment.

cuts.name: focused_tutorial
cuts.editorial_lens: Focused tutorial hitting the watch-time sweet spot. Clear structure: problem statement, walkthrough, result. Trim tangents aggressively.

cuts.name: deep_dive
cuts.editorial_lens: Deep dives, conference talks, committed audience. Preserve the full argument but cut dead air, repetition, and off-topic tangents.
